name: Nancy Reagan's Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 325 degrees. Line two cookie sheets with foil.
In a medium bowl, beat the egg whites, sugar, salt, and vanilla until combined.
Add the flour and blend well.
Fold in the shredded coconut.
Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheets, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until lightly golden.
Let cool on the cookie sheets.
Remove from the sheets and store tightly covered.
Yield: 2 to 2 1/2 dozen.
